---
name: Discussion
about: Discuss any node in the graph, or a graph-wide concern
title: '[<ID>] <short description>'
labels: 'discussion'
assignees: ''
---

**Node:** `<ID>` (e.g., `C-0017`) — leave blank if discussing the graph as a whole.
**Path:** `graph/<type>/<ID>.md`

## Discussion

<!--
Your question, observation, or proposal.

If you intend to contribute a new node — a Claim, Evidence, counterclaim,
counter-evidence, new Question, Method, or Source — describe the contribution
here. The actual node creation happens via PR; the schema (SCHEMA.md) does the
semantic work. A counterclaim is a Claim with `opposes:` set; counter-evidence
is an Evidence with `opposes:` set; etc. There is no separate template for
each — every node uses the same schema.

Use this issue to discuss the contribution before opening the PR if you want
input from others first. Otherwise, open the PR directly.
-->
